roles.title: Founder & Lead Engineer
roles.description: Engineering AI-native systems via SPARC prompt architecture. Shipped Nexus (fintech platform) and the SPARC open-source library. Every deployment serves as a production testbed for high-speed, LLM-assisted development workflows.

roles.title: AI Code Analyst / Software Developer – AI Trainer
roles.description: Refactoring and auditing AI-generated logic across Python and JavaScript to enforce production standards. Evaluating LLM outputs against complex technical rubrics for accuracy and safety. Designing unit tests and adversarial coding challenges to evaluate model reasoning and API integration capabilities.

roles.title: Lead Software Engineer | AI Systems
roles.description: Architected the Magnet AI Agents platform, deploying voice and chat agents that automated client intake and qualifying logic. Built the Magnet CRM, a white-label sales OS deployed for clients in <7 days. Standardized the SPARC methodology, reducing build times for complex applications by 75% through systematic prompt engineering.

roles.title: Duty Store Manager
roles.description: Directed daily logistics and inventory flow for high-volume grocery retail. Optimized team output and operational throughput in a time-critical environment.

roles.title: Operations Technology Platform (OTP) Manager
roles.description: Maintained 99.9% uptime for POS and network infrastructure across high-volume restaurant sites. Performed monthly system audits and fault-resolution for critical hardware.

roles.title: Assistant Business Manager
roles.description: Promoted from Crew to ABM over 9 years. Managed QSC&V standards, team P&L, and store-wide sales strategy.

roles.title: Assistant Restaurant Manager
roles.description: Managed daily operations for the flagship Taco Bell site, hitting top-tier speed-of-service and labor efficiency targets. Launched two new locations, recruiting and training 70+ staff members. Reduced food waste by 15% through optimized inventory control.
